hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: Upgrades Overwatch effect to Ultra-Overwatch effect.
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Ultra-Overwatch: Grant Shield of 20% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Deals damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to the enemy target, applying #Entry_1# to yourself for 1 turn. If you already have Overwatch, deal additional 100% ATK damage to the target.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Deals damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to the enemy target, applying #Entry_1# to yourself for 1 turn. If you already have Overwatch, deal additional 100% ATK damage to the target.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Overwatch: Grant Shield of 10% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra-Overwatch: Grant Shield of 20% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1081_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: When battle starts, apply #Entry_1# effect to the enemy target with the highest ATK. When the target with Lockdown uses the Active Skill or takes damage from an Active Skill, all allies’ basic stats are increased by 2%, up to 8%.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When battle starts, apply #Entry_1# effect to the enemy target with the highest ATK. When the target with Lockdown uses the Active Skill or takes damage from an Active Skill, all allies’ basic stats are increased by 2%, up to 8%.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Lockdown: Reduce ATK of the Character affected by Lockdown by 20%, reduce damage dealt by Level 2 Skills by 30%, and reduce damage dealt by Level 3 Skills by 50%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Lockdown: Reduce ATK of the Character affected by Lockdown by 20%, reduce damage dealt by Level 2 Skills by 30%, and reduce damage dealt by Level 3 Skills by 50%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1081_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: When your HP first drops below 40%, grant yourself #Entry_1# for 1 turn. If you already have Overwatch, grant yourself the effect that the next damage taken is fixed at 1. When you are affected by Overwatch, The max damage taken by allied Anteiku Characters from a single Skill doesn’t exceed 30% of their max HP
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When your HP first drops below 40%, grant yourself #Entry_1# for 1 turn. If you already have Overwatch, grant yourself the effect that the next damage taken is fixed at 1. When you are affected by Overwatch, The max damage taken by allied Anteiku Characters from a single Skill doesn’t exceed 30% of their max HP
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Overwatch: Grant Shield of 10% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Overwatch: Grant Shield of 10% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1081_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: When your turn starts, if your Character triggered Overwatch in the previous turn, grant your Anteiku Character with the lowest HP the effect of reducing damage taken by 20% in 1 turn, and grant yourself #Entry_1#.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When your turn starts, if your Character triggered Overwatch in the previous turn, grant your Anteiku Character with the lowest HP the effect of reducing damage taken by 20% in 1 turn, and grant yourself #Entry_1#.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Fortify: Increase the damage of Active Skills of your Anteiku Characters by 15%. Dismissed after it takes effect.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Fortify: Increase the damage of Active Skills of your Anteiku Characters by 15%. Dismissed after it takes effect.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases basic stats by 10% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases basic stats by 10% for 1 turn.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1081_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: When your HP drops below 40% for the first time, grant yourself #Entry_1# for 1 turn. If you already have Overwatch, grant yourself the effect that the next damage taken is fixed at 1. When you are affected by Overwatch, The max damage taken by allied Anteiku Characters from a single Skill doesn’t exceed 30% of their max HP. When your turn ends, if you are affected by Overwatch, Restore HP for your Character with the lowest HP by 10% of its lost HP
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When your HP drops below 40% for the first time, grant yourself #Entry_1# for 1 turn. If you already have Overwatch, grant yourself the effect that the next damage taken is fixed at 1. When you are affected by Overwatch, The max damage taken by allied Anteiku Characters from a single Skill doesn’t exceed 30% of their max HP. When your turn ends, if you are affected by Overwatch, Restore HP for your Character with the lowest HP by 10% of its lost HP
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Overwatch: Grant Shield of 10% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Overwatch: Grant Shield of 10% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage

skills.name: tid#SkillName_weak_1
skills.desc_short_translated: When your Character causes Weak, reduce the damage taken by all our allies by 5% for 1 turn
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When your Character causes Weak, reduce the damage taken by all our allies by 5% for 1 turn

skills.name: tid#SkillName_Talent_Common
skills.desc_short_translated: When the battle starts, gain a shield equal to 5% of your MAX HP for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When the battle starts, gain a shield equal to 5% of your MAX HP for 1 turn.

skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] In PVE, increase allied Anteiku Characters' HP-related stats by 3%.
